defs: Having the power of acting or of invisible efficacy without the agency of the material or sensible part; potential; energizing.
quotes: Heat and cold have a virtual transition, without communication of substance.
Every kind that lives, Fomented by his virtual power, and warmed.

defs: Being in essence or effect, not in fact; as, the virtual presence of a man in his agent or substitute.
quotes: A thing has a virtual existence when it has all the conditions necessary to its actual existence.
To mask by slight differences in the manners a virtual identity in the substance.
